description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and elongated representation of an adult pedestrian, with a stretched and warped body form. The head is visible and relatively intact, but the rest of the body is unnaturally extended, with limbs and torso appearing as thin, ribbon-like structures. The clothing is depicted as a long, flowing garment, possibly a coat or dress, that merges with the stretched body. The feet are visible at the ends of the elongated lower sections, but are also distorted. The overall appearance is surreal and abstract, lacking realistic human proportions. The surface has a smooth, painted look with visible shading and highlights.
description: A highly distorted, elongated adult pedestrian figure with a stretched body and flowing garment, featuring a visible head and abstracted limbs.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are most visible, with the face partially intact and the garment flowing downward in a stretched manner.
description_view_1: The side profile emphasizes the extreme elongation of the body and limbs, with the feet and lower garment trailing off.
description_view_2: A rear-angled view showing the stretched back and the thin, ribbon-like structure of the body and legs.
description_view_3: The lower body and feet are more prominent, with the garment's length and distortion clearly visible.
attribute_clothing_type: long overcoat or robe with full-length coverage
attribute_posture: unnaturally stretched and distorted, with limbs and torso elongated
